_comment: Topup packs surfaced in the UI. amount_fen is what we charge via Stripe (in CNY 分; 1 元 = 100 fen). credits is what we add to the balance. Flat rate: 1 元 = 100 credits, so credits == amount_fen.

packs.label: 体验包
packs.description: 10 次测字 / 5 次六爻 / 2 次八字

packs.label: 标准包
packs.description: 30 次测字 / 15 次六爻 / 6 次八字

packs.label: 大包
packs.description: 100 次测字 / 50 次六爻 / 20 次八字
